prestazioni: Engine: 4G63T (2.0L inline-4, 16V DOHC, MIVEC) with forged internals including JE 87mm forged pistons (9.0:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 400+ hp reliability on E85 fuel. Turbocharger upgrade to Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valve, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe and GReddy Revolution RS 3.5" cat-back exhaust with 80mm tips.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) in the rear differential, Cusco Type-RS front LSD, and a reinforced transmission with PPG straight-cut gears (1st: 2.785, 2nd: 1.950, 3rd: 1.407) and a PTT twin-disc carbon clutch. Driveshafts upgraded to Tomioka Racing carbon fiber units with billet yokes.

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8/16-position adjustability, Cusco 22mm front sway bar (adjustable), Whiteline 24mm rear sway bar, and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) throughout. Braking system features AP Racing 6-pot front calipers (356mm discs) and 4-pot rear calipers (330mm discs) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge braided stainless steel lines.
estetica: Body Kit: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody conversion with carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom carbon fiber roof (weight reduction: ~12kg). Rear spoiler replaced with a Voltex Type-7 GT wing (carbon fiber, 1,500mm width) on custom aluminum mounts.

Wheels & Tires: WORK Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +15 ET (front) and 18x10.5 +20 ET (rear) in gloss black, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). Brake calipers painted in Motul Racing Blue with custom laser-etched Mitsubishi logos.

Interior: Recaro SP-G (JDM-spec) front seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, MOMO Mod.70 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a custom roll cage (TIG-welded, 4-point) by AutoPower. Dashboard modified with a Defi Advance BF gauges (oil temp, oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) and a Link G4+ Xtreme ECU with CAN bus integration for real-time telemetry.
